sourceRef.citation: Kourovka Notebook, Problem 13.12 (Khukhro & Mazurov eds., ed.13)

statement.latex: Is the group of all automorphisms of an arbitrary hyperbolic group finitely presented? Comment of 2001:\/ This is proved for the group of automorphisms of a torsion-free hyperbolic group that cannot be decomposed into a free product (Z.\,Sela, Geom. Funct. Anal., 7, no.\,3 (1997) 561--593).

reiAssessment.solveRationale: Group theory VI_BRIDGING; Rei not specialized in group theory (yet)
reiAssessment.formalizationNotes: Kourovka problems are typically research-level group theory
